response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with roughly 15 years of production engineering, strong TypeScript, and current hands-on work at Naver on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, which maps directly to this role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and his AI-specific experience only began in 2025; there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python, and no clear record of customer-facing technical discovery leadership. He could be worth a conversation for the MCP/agentic depth alone, but he falls well short of the core GenAI requirements for a Staff FDE.
strengths: Current hands-on experience building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at Naver
15+ years shipping production systems across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends with strong TypeScript and cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing record through workshops, conference talks, and multi-day courses
concerns: Only about one year of AI/GenAI work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python is absent from his skill set, and there is no demonstrated experience leading customer-facing technical discovery

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI-solutions experience (~1 year vs 8+ required)
Direct MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience
No RAG, vector database, or Python background
